title: GrowGeneration Corp (GRWG) Q1 2021 Earnings Call Transcript
text: GrowGeneration delivered exceptional first-quarter 2021 results. The company generated $90 million in the quarter, a 173% increase year over year, with a 51% increase in same store sales. Net income reached a record $6.1 million, or $0.10 per share, compared to a loss of $2.1 million in the prior year. Adjusted EBITDA surged to over $11 million, representing a 364% increase from the $2.4 million reported in Q1 2020. Management raised full-year guidance to $450 million to $470 million in revenue and $54 million to $58 million in adjusted EBITDA. The company operates 53 locations across 12 states and plans to reach at least 65 stores by year-end through acquisitions and new greenfield openings in markets including California, Mississippi, Oklahoma, New York, and New Jersey. The e-commerce channel expanded dramatically, growing 126% to $4.4 million in the quarter. The company achieved over 100,000 walk-in customers per month at its hydroponic garden centers. Private label products contributed meaningfully, representing 6.2% of overall revenue in Q1, with management targeting 10% for the full year. The company acquired two proprietary brands Power SI and Char Coir, expected to generate over $10 million each in 2021 revenue. GrowGeneration also purchased agron.io, a B2B agricultural platform for commercial growers. The workforce expanded to over 600 employees.
